commands: yarn run openapi-generator-cli generate --git-repo-id=clients --git-user-id=daytona -i openapi-specs/api.json -g typescript-axios --additional-properties=supportsES6=true,typescriptThreePlus=true,withSeparateModelsAndApi=true,apiPackage=api,modelPackage=models,useTags=true,enumPropertyNaming=UPPERCASE,enumUnknownDefaultCase=true --type-mappings=DateTime=Date -o api-client/src

options.command: if [ -n "$NPM_PKG_VERSION" ] || [ -n "$DEFAULT_PACKAGE_VERSION" ]; then VER=${NPM_PKG_VERSION:-$DEFAULT_PACKAGE_VERSION}; npm version "$VER" --allow-same-version --no-git-tag-version && echo "Changed version to $VER"; else echo "Using version from package.json"; fi

commands: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); pkg.name = '@daytonaio/api-client'; fs.writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2));"
